IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: MANAGEMENT AND OTHER SUPPORT SERVICES FOR NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE AFFILIATED ORGANIZATIONS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO IMPROVE THE WELL-BEING OF OUR COMMUNITIES BY PROVIDING ACCESSIBLE HIGH-QUALITY CARE.
IRS990.Desc: NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE CORPORATION (NBHC) IS THE PARENT ORGANIZATION OF THREE CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATIONS; ONE OF THOSE CORPORATIONS, NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP, OWNS AND OPERATES NON-PROFIT COMMUNITY HOSPITALS IN FAIRFIELD AND VACAVILLE. THE PURPOSE OF NBHC IS TO SUPPORT AND HELP CARRY OUT THE PURPOSES AND FUNCTIONS OF NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP, NORTHBAY HEALTH ADVANTAGE, AND NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION. THIS IS ACCOMPLISHED THROUGH PROVIDING COORDINATION, MANAGEMENT, AND OTHER SUPPORT SERVICES TO THE NON-PROFIT HOSPITALS AND OTHER RELATED COMMUNITY HEALTHCARE PROGRAMS. THESE SERVICES INCLUDE MARKETING, RESEARCH OF NEW CLINICAL SERVICE AREAS, MANAGING CONTRACTS BETWEEN PROVIDERS AND PAYORS, AND FINANCING.

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.PersonNm: HEATHER RESSEGER DNP RN CNL CPHQ
Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.TitleTxt: SVP, CHIEF HOSPITAL OPS & NURSING OFFICER
SVP, CHIEF PHIL OFFICER / PRES NBHF
SR DIR PERIOP SRVCS / WOUND / ASC
SR DIR, HOSPITAL THROUGHPUT & CLIN SUPP SRVCS

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART I, SECTION A, LINE 12G, COLUMN (VI):
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION PROVIDES COORDINATION, MANAGEMENT, AND OTHER SUPPORT SERVICES TO NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP. THESE SERVICES INCLUDE MARKETING, RESEARCH OF NEW CLINICAL SERVICE AREAS, MANAGING CONTRACTS BETWEEN PROVIDERS AND PAYORS, AND FINANCING.

NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE CORPORATION (NBHC) IS THE SOLE CORPORATE MEMBER OF NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP (NBHG), AS WELL AS NBHG'S OTHER SUPPORTING ORGANIZATIONS (NORTHBAY HEALTH ADVANTAGE AND NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE FOUNDATION). NBHC SERVES AS THE PARENT AND SUPPORTS AND CARRIES OUT THE PURPOSES AND FUNCTIONS OF NBHG. NBHC, A TYPE II SUPPORTING ORGANIZATION, HAS A HISTORICAL AND CONTINUOUS WORKING RELATIONSHIP WITH ITS SUPPORTED ORGANIZATION, NBHG, IN THAT TWO MEMBERS OF NBHC'S BOARD AND THE CEO OF NBHC SERVE AS VOTING DIRECTORS OF NBHG, THUS ENSURING NBHC WILL BE RESPONSIVE TO THE NEEDS OF NBHG.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION PAYS MEMBERSHIP DUES TO THE CALIFORNIA HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION / CALIFORNIA ASSOCIATION OF HOSPITALS AND HEALTH SYSTEMS; A PORTION OF THOSE DUES ARE ATTRIBUTABLE TO LOBBYING, WHICH SUPPORTS CERTAIN INITIATIVES THAT ARE HEALTHCARE RELATED AND CONSISTENT WITH ITS MISSION OF PROMOTING HEALTHCARE WITHIN ITS COMMUNITY.

RecipientTable.PurposeOfGrantTxt: SPONSORSHIP AND GENERAL SUPPORT FOR TEMPORARY SHELTER FOR THE UNHOUSED.
SPONSORSHIP AND GENERAL SUPPORT FOR SOLANO COUNTY LIBRARY.
SPONSORSHIP AND GENERAL SUPPORT TO ENSURE A HEALTHY ENVIRONMENT.
SPONSORSHIP AND GENERAL SUPPORT FOR MEDICAL EDUCATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: NBHC GRANTS FUNDS TO OTHER LOCAL NON-PROFITS AND COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS KNOWN TO NBHC TO ASSIST WITH THEIR FUNDRAISING ENDEAVORS. NBHC DOES NOT MONITOR USE OF THESE GRANT FUNDS, AS GRANT FUNDS ARE UNRESTRICTED.

RltdOrgOfficerTrstKeyEmplGrp.TitleTxt: SVP, CHIEF HOSPITAL OPS & NURSING OF
SVP, CHIEF PHIL OFFICER / PRES NBHF
SR DIR PERIOP SRVCS / WOUND / ASC
SR DIR, HOSPITAL THROUGHPUT & CLIN S

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUALS RECEIVED THE FOLLOWING TAXABLE SEVERANCE PAYMENTS IN THE 2024 CALENDAR YEAR, WHICH HAS BEEN REPORTED AS "OTHER REPORTABLE COMPENSATION" ON SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN (B)(III): B. KONARD JONES - $854,758 TIMOTHY WILLIAMS - $413,691 SHENIECE SMITH - $525,304 THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUALS PARTICIPATED IN THE ORGANIZATION'S SUPPLEMENTAL 457(F) RETIREMENT PLAN. EMPLOYER CONTRIBUTIONS TO THE PLAN DURING THE 2024 CALENDAR YEAR ARE AS FOLLOWS, WHICH HAS BEEN REPORTED AS "RETIREMENT AND OTHER DEFERRED COMPENSATION" ON SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN (C): SETH KAUFMAN - $58,917 JAMES ANDERSEN - $48,204 TRACY GEDDIS - $45,525 HEATHER RESSEGER - $44,321 PAUL MCGINTY - $42,850 ADDITIONALLY, DUE TO VESTING OF THE 457(F) PLAN, THE FOLLOWING INDIVIDUALS RECOGNIZED THE FOLLOWING AMOUNTS AS TAXABLE COMPENSATION, WHICH HAS BEEN REPORTED WITHIN "OTHER REPORTABLE COMPENSATION" ON SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN (B)(III) AS WELL AS WITHIN "COMPENSATION IN COLUMN (B) REPORTED AS DEFERRED ON PRIOR FORM 990" ON SCHEDULE J, PART II, COLUMN F: B. KONARD JONES - $18,941 TIMOTHY WILLIAMS - $80,537

THE SENIOR MANAGEMENT INCENTIVE PROGRAM INCLUDES SPECIFIC CRITERIA WHICH MUST BE MET IN ORDER FOR SUCH INDIVIDUALS TO RECEIVE ADDITIONAL COMPENSATION; SOME OF THIS CRITERIA REQUIRES SUPERVISORS AND/OR THE BOARD TO EXERCISE DISCRETION (IN PART) WHEN CALCULATING THE AMOUNT OF PAYMENT OR DECIDING WHETHER TO MAKE SUCH A PAYMENT.

ALL FORM 1099S FOR NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE CORPORATION WERE FILED BY NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP, A RELATED ORGANIZATION. ACCORDINGLY, THE AMOUNT REPORTED ON FORM 990, PART V, LINE 1A (THE AMOUNT REPORTED ON THE 2024 FORM 1096, BOX 3) REFLECTS ZERO. ADDITIONALLY, ALL FORM W-2S FOR NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE SYSTEM WERE FILED BY NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE CORPORATION, WHICH IS THE BASIS FOR THE NUMBER OF EMPLOYEES REPORTED ON FORM 990, PART V, LINE 2A.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 IS PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT TAX ACCOUNTANT AND REVIEWED BY THE CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER; ADJUSTMENTS ARE MADE, AS NECESSARY. A COMPLETE COPY OF THE FORM 990 IS PROVIDED TO ALL VOTING MEMBERS OF THE GOVERNING BODY FOR REVIEW AND COMMENT PRIOR TO FILING WITH THE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION REQUESTS ALL OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, KEY EMPLOYEES AND MEMBERS OF COMMITTEES APPOINTED BY THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS TO SELF-MONITOR COMPLIANCE WITH THE ORGANIZATION'S CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY; IN ADDITION, EACH OFFICER AND BOARD MEMBERS MUST ANNUALLY COMPLETE A CONFLICT OF INTEREST STATEMENT. THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST STATEMENTS ARE REVIEWED AND ALL RESPONSES FILED. IF A POTENTIAL CONFLICT ARISES, BOARD MEMBERS AND EMPLOYEES ARE REQUIRED TO SELF-DISCLOSE THE CONFLICT TO THE CORPORATE COMPLIANCE OFFICER. PROCESSES AND PROCEDURES ARE IN PLACE TO EVALUATE AND DETERMINE IF A POSSIBLE CONFLICT OF INTEREST EXISTS. IF A CONFLICT OF INTEREST EXISTS, THE INDIVIDUAL WILL PRESENT RELEVANT INFORMATION TO THE BOARD. AFTER SUCH PRESENTATION, THE INDIVIDUAL SHALL LEAVE THE MEETING DURING THE DISCUSSION OF, AND VOTE ON, THE TRANSACTION OR ARRANGEMENT INVOLVING THE POSSIBLE CONFLICT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AN AD HOC COMPENSATION COMMITTEE OF THE HEALTH SYSTEM BOARD REVIEWS EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION, INCLUDING THAT OF THE ORGANIZATION'S CEO, OTHER OFFICERS, AND KEY EMPLOYEES; THEY ARE ASSISTED BY INDEPENDENT CONSULTANTS. THE ORGANIZATION USES INDEPENDENT LOCAL SURVEYS AS A MEANS TO SUBSTANTIATE COMPENSATION DECISIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE ON THE DIGITAL ASSURANCE CORPORATION WEBSITE. THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY ARE NOT MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC.

TEMPORARY LABOR: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 353,861. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 54,713. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 0. TOTAL EXPENSES 408,574. OTHER PROFESSIONAL SERVICES: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 146,374. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 272,982. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 0. TOTAL EXPENSES 419,356. PURCHASED SERVICES - OTHER: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 40,761,975. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 1,261,046. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 0. TOTAL EXPENSES 42,023,021. PHYSICIAN FEES: PROGRAM SERVICE EXPENSES 54,949. MANAGEMENT AND GENERAL EXPENSES 0. FUNDRAISING EXPENSES 0. TOTAL EXPENSES 54,949.

IdRelatedTaxExemptOrgGrp.PrimaryActivitiesTxt: MANAGES REAL ESTATE FOR NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP & AFFILIATES
PROVIDES FUNDRAISING FOR NORTHBAY HEALTHCARE GROUP & AFFILIATES
HEALTH CARE SERVICES, INCLUDING HOSPITAL AND PHYSICIAN SERVICES
